intent_groups.description: Create or refine a single hyperreal character image.
Create or refine a multi-character scene requiring instance separation, depth ordering, contact graph, and occlusion control.
Adjust silhouette, proportions, body region shape, or anatomy without regenerating the whole scene unless required.
Plan visual contact/compression/indentation/ripple/bounce approximation using masks, contact graph, depth/normal guides, and QA.
Plan room/world/environment, lighting, lens, camera angle, depth of field, subject framing, and shot constraints.
Plan frame sequence, keyframes, camera motion, temporal masks, video engine route, and temporal QA.
Plan voice, foley, room acoustics, force-synced events, ambience, music/SFX and AV sync QA.
Select/checkpoint/LoRA/control/upscaler/video/audio assets using Civitai metadata, registry columns, engine family, S3/local/EC2 paths, and QA state.

ask_user_only_when: the request cannot be executed without a missing user-provided file/reference
the requested output format is impossible to infer
a blocking contradiction exists between required constraints
ambiguity_policy.otherwise: choose conservative production defaults and mark them in assumptions[]
